channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: First images of ICE mass deportation efforts show arrests of MS-13 gang members, murder suspects
item.description: Fox News exclusively embedded with ICE Boston on Wednesday, witnessing the agency arrest multiple egregious criminal aliens as part of mass deportation efforts.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Key Senate chairman criticizes 'anonymous sources with ulterior motives,' stands by Hegseth nomination
item.description: A key senator says he is standing by Pete Hegseth, President Donald Trump’s Secretary of Defense pick, and criticized "anonymous sources" casting doubt on his character.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Stick with us: Why the internet is obsessed with one of the simplest tools known to man
item.description: "Stick Nation" is a worldwide movement that thrives on irreverent, fantastical and downright wholesome descriptions of sticks.
item.dc:creator: Alina Hartounian, MPR News

item.title: Hannity reveals what he told Trump after 2020 election loss: ‘Winston Churchill’ return
item.description: Fox News Sean Hannity revealed the conversation he shared with President Donald Trump following his 2020 election loss in an exclusive interview with Trump.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Department of Justice freezes all civil rights division cases: report
item.description: The Department of Justice sent a memo to the interim director of the civil rights division, ordering a freeze to all ongoing litigation and a stop to any new cases.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NJ bill looks to eliminate hurdle for student service members
item.description: FLORHAM PARK, N.J. (PIX11) - From studying to serving: that was National Guard veteran Frank "Doc" Schupp's life in the late 2000s. He was called to deploy to Iraq at the end of his last semester of his junior year at Kean University, in the midst of prepping for finals.
item.dc:creator: Jim Vasil, PIX 11

item.title: Congress clears GOP-led immigration enforcement bill, with Democrats on board
item.description: The Laken Riley Act would make it easier for federal immigration officials to detain and deport those without legal status who are charged with specific crimes.
item.dc:creator: Ximena Bustillo and Deirdre Walsh, MPR News

item.title: Newsom navigates his relationship with Trump as wildfires ravage his state
item.description: California, Gov. Gavin Newsom is unsure if he’s welcome to join President Donald Trump’s wildfire tour.
item.dc:creator: Steve Peoples, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: NYC Mayor Adams: I'm 'at a loss' on how to handle migrants in NYC
item.description: Adams criticized the Biden administration for their border policies in an interview with Tucker Carlson.
item.dc:creator: Caitlyn Becker, NewsNation

item.title: Where Donald Trump's executive orders rank historically
item.description: President Donald Trump is on pace to surpass Joe Biden's executive orders signed during his first 100 days in office
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: Oath Keepers founder Stewart Rhodes visits Capitol Hill after Trump clemency
item.description: Oath Keepers founder Stewart Rhodes, the far-right extremist group leader convicted of seditious conspiracy in the Jan. 6, 2021, attack, has visited Capitol Hill after President Donald Trump commuted his 18-year prison sentence.
item.dc:creator: Michael Kunzelman, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump threatens Russia with tariffs and sanctions if it does not agree to end war
item.description: It is unclear how much impact economic penalties would have on the Russian government, since they already face various sanctions imposed by the previous administration.
item.dc:creator: Franco Ordoñez, MPR News

item.title: Congressional Black Caucus blasts Trump DEI action as step backward
item.description: The Congressional Black Caucus (CBC), one of the largest in Congress, blasted President Trump on Wednesday for rolling back diversity, equity and inclusion (DEI) programs in the federal government.
item.dc:creator: Cheyanne M. Daniels, NewsNation

item.title: GOP leaders stare down legislative minefield after Trump's Day 1 blitz
item.description: President Trump made a big splash with dozens of executive actions on his first day in office, but now comes the hard part: getting Republicans in Congress in line to usher an ambitious legislative agenda through their slim majorities and clashing factions. Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, NewsNation

item.title: Trump popularity higher than throughout most of first term: Poll
item.description: The poll found Trump with a 47 percent approval rating, higher than almost the entirety of his first term, though still below the majority support that most other presidents have enjoyed at the start of their administrations.
item.dc:creator: Jared Gans, Fox 5

item.title: Speaker Johnson won’t ‘second-guess’ Trump pardons of violent Jan. 6 rioters
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) defended President Trump’s sweeping pardons of those who stormed the Capitol on Jan. 6, 2021, including numerous people who violently attacked police officers. “The president's made his decision. I don't second-guess those,” Johnson said at a press conference Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Auto-followed Trump on Facebook? It's probably because you previously liked the POTUS account
item.description: Some Facebook and Instagram users were surprised to find themselves automatically following the accounts of President Donald Trump or Vice President JD Vance this week after the president was inaugurated.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: What cabinet appointments for Sean Duffy, Kristi Noem, and Doug Burgum could mean for Minnesota
item.description: Three regional leaders—Doug Burgum, Kristi Noem, and Sean Duffy—are among President-elect Donald Trump’s Cabinet nominees. Their potential appointments could significantly influence Minnesota and neighboring states.
item.dc:creator: Cathy Wurzer, Gracie Stockton, and Matthew Alvarez, MPR News

item.title: Estimated 24.6 million TV viewers watched inauguration coverage, smallest audience since 2013
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — An estimated 24.6 million television viewers watched President Donald Trump's second inauguration, the smallest audience for the quadrennial ceremony since Barack Obama's second inauguration in 2013.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BAUDER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: DeSantis: North Florida could see several inches of snow
item.description: Gov. Ron DeSantis warned of potential snowfall this week, amid the freezing temperatures impacting northern Florida.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump attends prayer service at National Cathedral
item.description: After being sworn in on Monday, President Donald Trump marked his first full day in office with a prayer service at Washington National Cathedral on Tuesday morning.
item.dc:creator: Robert Sherman, Fox 5

item.title: Trump is withdrawing from the Paris Agreement (again), reversing U.S. climate policy
item.description: President Donald Trump issued a barrage of orders Monday targeting Biden-era initiatives on global warming. The decisions come on the heels of the hottest year ever recorded.
item.dc:creator: Nate Perez and Rachel Waldholz, MPR News

item.title: Biden won't enforce TikTok ban, official says, leaving fate of app to Trump
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden won't enforce a ban on the social media app TikTok that is set to take effect a day before he leaves office on Monday, a U.S. official said Thursday, leaving its fate in the hands of President-elect Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: ZEKE MILLER, JOSH BOAK, MICHELLE L. PRICE and MARY CLARE JALONICK, Associated Press, Fox 5
